chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2312 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Disposed of matter 1. For orders on M.A. No.3781/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.3782/2026 (Return of surety) ----------------------------------------------------- 06.03.2026 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Shar, advocate for applicant/surety Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. ------------------------------------- Along with urgent application, applicant/surety has moved application for return of surety. It appears that protective bail was granted to applicant Muhammad Ilyas Rajput son of Muhammad Saleem Rajput by this Court vide order dated 08.09.2025, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.40,000/- and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court for a period of five days. As per Nazir’s endorsement one Muhammad Shahid son of Muhammad Latif furnished surety by way of depositing cash amount Rs.40,000/-. Counsel for applicant/surety submits that applicant/ accused above named surrendered before learned Additional Sessions Judge-I/MCTC Shaheed Benazir Abad and was admitted to interim pre-arrest bail vide order dated 15.09.2025. Copy of order dated 15.09.2025 has been placed on record. Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. present in Court in some other cases, waives notice and after having gone through the case file and aforesaid order has recorded his no objection for return of surety. In view of above, surety furnished by the applicant/ surety is no more required. Application for return of surety is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety to the applicant/surety upon proper verification and identification, as per rules.
Application for return of surety is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety to the applicant/surety upon proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
